headline: **MLB Daily Recap: May 17, 2026**
article:
The Toronto Blue Jays secured a narrow 2-1 victory over the Detroit Tigers, with Yohendrick Piñango leading the Blue Jays' offense. The St. Louis Cardinals took down the Kansas City Royals 4-2, with Kyle Leahy earning the win. The Colorado Rockies defeated the Arizona Diamondbacks 4-2, with Tomoyuki Sugano earning the win and Antonio Senzatela securing the save.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Jack Dreyer, who has been placed on the 15-day injured list by the Los Angeles Dodgers due to left shoulder discomfort. Other notable injuries include Hunter Harvey, who has been transferred to the 60-day injured list by the Chicago Cubs, and Ty Madden, who has been placed on the 15-day injured list by the Detroit Tigers.

The Chicago White Sox made a significant roster move, acquiring center fielder Junior Perez from the Athletics in exchange for left-handed pitcher Jackson Nove.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Edge Tigers in Thrilling 2-1 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays secured a narrow win over the Detroit Tigers, with a final score of 2-1. Yohendrick Piñango led the Blue Jays' offense with a strong performance, recording 2 hits, including a home run, and 1 RBI.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Take Down Royals 4-2**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals secured a 2-4 victory over the Kansas City Royals, with Kyle Leahy earning the win after 6.0 innings of work. Jac Caglianone led the Royals' offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 1 RBI.

top_news.title: **Rockies Take Down Diamondbacks 4-2**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies secured a 2-4 victory over the Arizona Diamondbacks, with Tomoyuki Sugano earning the win and Antonio Senzatela securing the save. Mickey Moniak led the Diamondbacks with 2 RBI, while Eduardo Rodriguez pitched 5.1 innings with 6 strikeouts.

top_news.title: Washington Nationals Takes 3-13 Win
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals dominated the Baltimore Orioles 13-3 behind Cade Cavalli's 6.1 innings with 8 strikeouts and Keibert Ruiz's 3 hits, 1 home run, and 5 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Dodgers Place Jack Dreyer on 15-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Los Angeles Dodgers left-handed pitcher Jack Dreyer has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to left shoulder discomfort. The move was made on May 17, 2026.

top_news.title: **White Sox Acquire Junior Perez in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Chicago White Sox have acquired center fielder Junior Perez from the Athletics in exchange for left-handed pitcher Jackson Nove. This move adds depth to the White Sox outfield.
